summary: Frontend E2E for Weekly Attendance, Seasons, and Tasks pages verified across super_admin, team_leader, and member roles. All 30 test assertions passed. Mobile responsive layout confirmed at 375x812.

issues: Hydration/console warning: <span> injected as child of <option> (from x-source instrumentation). Does not break UX but generates React error in console. Likely from Emergent x-source dev instrumentation on dynamic <option> nodes.

critical_code_review_comments: Seasons.jsx: season-report-modal close button is 'button.first' which is the same as the X icon - OK, but the button lacks a data-testid for the close action.
Tasks.jsx <option> renders {u.name} — {u.email} directly; dev instrumentation wraps text in <span> under <option> triggering React hydration warning. Consider concatenating string only.
WeeklyAttendance mark() uses busy string composed of event_id+event_date - fine, but consider tuple. No blocker.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Season_QA_2026 season and TEST_TASK_QA task; attempted UI deletion of both after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All role-based flows for Weekly/Seasons/Tasks verified. Weekly marking tested by navigating to next week (past days locked as expected). Mobile viewport 375x812 confirms: event cards stacked, tasks 3-col stat chips remain visible, seasons show 1 col. Only cosmetic: React warning about <span> inside <option> from x-source instrumentation on Tasks assignee dropdown.
